## Type of change

- [ ] New playbook
- [ ] New adapter
- [ ] New prompt template
- [ ] Tightening / correction to existing guidance
- [ ] Install/docs improvement

## Output Contract check

If this changes guidance the skill produces, confirm the six-part Output Contract still works on a real test case:

- [ ] Diagnosis present
- [ ] Prioritized recommendations
- [ ] Concrete examples
- [ ] Verification steps
- [ ] Risks/assumptions/dependencies
- [ ] Source references (when video-derived)

## Anti-patterns I checked I'm not introducing

- [ ] No bought-review / link-farm / hidden-text / doorway / cloaking recommendations
- [ ] No schema that doesn't mirror visible content
- [ ] No raw third-party transcripts
- [ ] No vendor lock-in to a single AI tool
- [ ] No keyword-stuffing or density-based guidance
